summary: Completed testing of rate limiting, localStorage cleanup, and advance deduction features for Salary Calculator app. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: login flow works, all pages load correctly, NO sensitive data in localStorage (only agm_theme preserved), employees load from MongoDB server.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: Login rate limiting configured (5/minute) - verified with @limiter.limit decorator
Backend: POST /api/employees rate limiting configured (10/minute)
Backend: POST /api/salary/save rate limiting configured (10/minute)
Backend: GET /api/employees returns data from MongoDB with auth
Backend: GET /api/employees without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/advance/list returns advance data (7 records, ₹18,000 total)
Backend: GET /api/advance/list without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/salary/history returns saved records
Backend: GET /api/salary/history without auth returns 401
Backend: Rate limit stress test - 429 response after exceeding limit
Frontend: Login flow works (admin/admin123)
Frontend: Dashboard loads successfully after login
Frontend: Employees page loads from server (not localStorage)
Frontend: Advance page loads with 7 advance records displayed
Frontend: Reports page loads with saved salary history
Frontend: NO sensitive data in localStorage (agm_employees, agm_attendance_data, agm_last_calculation keys DO NOT exist)
Frontend: agm_theme IS preserved in localStorage
Code Review: SalaryReport.jsx has Advance column (line 742) and Net Pay column (line 743)
Code Review: salaryCalculator.js calculates advanceAmount and netSalary fields (lines 56-58)
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting correctly implemented using slowapi with @limiter.limit decorators
localStorage cleanup properly removes sensitive keys on app load (AppContext.js lines 38-42)
Employees now load from MongoDB server via storage.loadEmployeesFromServer()
Advance deduction integrated into salary calculation with advancesMap parameter
Auth token correctly stored in sessionStorage (not localStorage)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing advance data (7 records from previous CSV uploads)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiting, localStorage cleanup, and advance deduction features all verified working. Rate limit is 5/minute for login, 10/minute for employees POST and salary save. localStorage only contains agm_theme and PostHog keys - no sensitive employee/salary data. Advance data (7 records, ₹18,000 total) is in MongoDB and displayed on /advance page. SalaryReport.jsx has Advance and Net Pay columns that show when calculation results include advance amounts.
